meaning: n.<美俚>男妓,皮条客vi.拉皮条
examples: Your pimp encourages drinking and you become addicted to drugs to ease the pain of it all.
One of the girls she rescued from a pimp later graduated from high school as valedictorian.
After the documentary American Pimp, they sent Johnny Depp in pursuit of Jack the Ripper in the 2001 From Hell, based on an Alan Moore graphic novel.
Or the year the premiere of a documentary called "American Pimp" attracted a handful of real pimps and their entourages, causing a near-riot when there weren't enough seats.
Things got better after Three 6 Mafia won Best Song, giving both Stewart and most of the other presenters something to riff on - primarily the title of their song, It's Hard Out Here For A Pimp.
